CustomField.formula: Product__r.ProductCode & "#" & TEXT(Type__c) &"#"& TEXT(Capacity__c) & TEXT(Chassis_Required__c) & TEXT(Encryption__c) & TEXT( Select_Node_Product__c ) & TEXT(HPEorUCS__c) & IF(Include_CloudOut__c,"TRUE","FALSE") & TEXT(NetworkType__c) & IF(Required__c,"TRUE","FALSE") & IF(Rubrik_Pro_Bundle__c,"TRUE","FALSE") & IF(SW_Encryption_Trade_Up__c,"TRUE","FALSE")
CustomField.label: Unique Name
